description: Milk: the first food of every mammal, and the household drink after. The word echoes 'milau' (drink) on purpose; milk is the drink before all others. Ungendered like everything in Phi: it belongs to nourishment, not to any word for who provides it.
sound_symbolism: Soft 'mi' into liquid 'lu'-'ra', with no stop consonant anywhere. The word pours.
grammatical_notes: Noun: 'lopia milura milau.' (The child drinks milk.) 'milura sulae nai.' (The milk is warm.)

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: The household animal that gave milk was wealth that renewed daily. Whole cuisines are built on the ways people kept milk from spoiling.
